# ADR-XXX: <Decision Title>

> **Status:** Proposed | Accepted | Superseded | Deprecated
>
> **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
>
> **Owner:** <Team or Owner>
>
> **Applies To:** <Repository Area>

---

# Context

Describe the problem or situation requiring an architectural decision.

Explain:

- Why the decision is required.
- What constraints exist.
- What goals should be achieved.

Avoid implementation details.

---

# Decision

Describe the architectural decision.

State the decision clearly and unambiguously.

---

# Rationale

Explain why this decision was selected.

Describe how it satisfies the architectural goals.

---

# Alternatives Considered

## Alternative 1

Description

Pros

Cons

---

## Alternative 2

Description

Pros

Cons

---

## Alternative 3

Description

Pros

Cons

---

# Consequences

Describe the expected impact of this decision.

Include:

Positive consequences

Negative consequences

Trade-offs

---

# Implementation Notes

List implementation considerations if applicable.

Do not document implementation history.

---

# Related Documents

List relevant documentation.

Examples:

- Architecture documents
- Standards
- Playbooks

---

# Related ADRs

List related architectural decisions.
